blended.narrative: Shawnee Peak is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,652 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light freezing drizzle, highs of 47°F.
Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
